new_jobs.title: ISP Technician
new_jobs.category: Computer Science, IT - Software, IT Support
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
ISP Technician
Job Requirements :
About AfghaNet :
AfghaNet is an internet service provider that delivers high speed, reliable internet service across all 34 provinces of Afghanistan. AfghaNet owns and operates a state-of-the-art data center with a direct fiber-optic connection on Afghanistan 's internet ring backbone. AfghaNet always strives to provide 100% uptime and no downtime by utilizing multiple redundant internet links, automated load balancing, and 24-hour monitoring. AfghaNet 's dedicated customer service center assigns a qualified account manager as a singular point of contact for you.
All AfghaNet equipment is delivered, installed and set up at no charge under our standard plans. All you pay is a flat fixed fee for unlimited usage. For offices, AfghaNet provides dedicated (1:1) internet connections. For residential hotspots, AfghaNet manages bandwidth to maximize speed and minimize latency. Our vision is to provide a consistently reliable internet connection across Afghanistan with unparalleled customer service while being socially responsible.
Job Summary :

Duties and Responsibilities
ISP Technician
Job Requirements :
Duties and Responsibilities:
Weekly visiting the clients for maintenance
Visiting Tower for maintenance issues
Site installation (Able to find the open channel-frequencies according to the locations)
Creating local-IPs on CCR
Subnets live-IPs.
Should be able to setup Point to Point and Point to Multipoint (able to install different PtP devices)
Provide full support to the clients.
Analyze and isolate network issues.
Determine network system and requirements to provide the best recommendations.
On-call/email support to clients
night shift duties as needed.
Public IP implementation
Participate in brainstorming sessions and contribute innovative and original ideas to technology, algorithms, and products.
Dive into difficult problems and successfully deliver results.
PROFESSIONAL CONDUCT:
Comply with personal legal liabilities and fiduciary requirements of diligence and care in carrying out the duties of AfghaNet.
Act honestly in all the affairs of AfghaNet and avoid conflict of interest and, should this arise, it must be declared.
Education: Bachelor's in computer science (Network).

Job Requirements
Education: Bachelor's in computer science (Network).
Experience:
At least 1-2 year of professional experience in ISP network platform
Enough knowledge of Mikrotik CCR configurations
Professional knowledge of Cacti / MRTG graph implementation
Enough knowledge of Point to point devices, Ubiquiti /LAG/ InfiNet etc
Ensure network connectivity throughout a company's LAN/WAN infrastructure.
Enough knowledge of Routers, Switches, Wireless AP, Enough knowledge of routing protocols.
Enough Knowledge of Cisco Switching technologies.
Results oriented, team player, able to work in a fast-paced environment and handle numerous incidents and clients.
Enough knowledge of frequencies Familiarity with continuous integration

Submission Guidelines
How to Apply:
Qualified candidates are encouraged to submit the following online using jobs.af :
Cover letter indicating suitability for the position
Updated CV (maximum two pages; CVs exceeding two pages will not be considered and will be disqualified)
Copies of relevant academic and professional qualifications
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted
https://careers.ahg.af//Home/view_job/02slViyGA-WLc-ChQ7WQy8skV3Y4m-dGh4fyptxTjto

new_jobs.title: Motion Graphic Designer
new_jobs.description:
About Qamar Foundation
Qamar Foundation is a registered non-profit organization in Afghanistan (Reg No. 7) and the UK (Reg No. 1150141).
We are dedicated to providing essential humanitarian assistance to those who are most in need.
Our team is driven by a deep commitment to equality and justice, fueled by a strong desire to save lives.

Job Description
Position Summary:
The Motion Graphic Designer is responsible for developing creative visual and multimedia content to support the organization’s communication, branding, fundraising, awareness, and digital engagement objectives.
The role focuses on motion graphics, animation, video production, graphic design, and multimedia storytelling for organizational campaigns, humanitarian projects, donor visibility, and social media platforms.
The position also requires field travel to project locations for visual documentation and content development.
Reports to : Media Manager
Key Responsibilities:
Develop high-quality motion graphics, animations, and visual effects for campaigns, awareness materials, social media content, for organizational communications.
Produce and edit professional multimedia content including promotional videos, documentaries, short-form videos and campaign materials in line with organizational branding and donor requirements.
Design creative visual materials including social media posts, banners, brochures, infographics, reports, certificates, presentations, and other communication assets.
Capture professional photos and video footage of organizational activities, project operations, events, and beneficiary stories for multimedia production and documentation purposes.
Travel to provincial project sites to document humanitarian activities, field operations, and project impact through visual storytelling.
Create engaging digital content and support the planning, scheduling, and publishing of multimedia materials across organizational social media platforms.
Collaborate with program, communication, and field teams to identify content opportunities and ensure timely production of multimedia materials.
Ensure consistency of organizational branding, visual identity, and donor visibility requirements across all digital and print outputs.
Organize, maintain, and archive multimedia files, project footage, graphic assets, and design resources in an efficient manner.
Provide innovative and creative input to strengthen the organization’s visibility, outreach, and digital presence.
Perform any other multimedia, design, or communication-related tasks assigned by the supervisor or management.

Job Requirements
High School plus certificate in Media Studies, Graphic Design, Fine Arts, or a related field.
Minimum 3 years of relevant professional experience in media production, and digital content management, preferably in NGOs/INGOs.
Strong experience in videography, photography, and field media documentation.
Proven expertise in Adobe Suite such as Adobe Premiere Pro, After effects, or similar.
Strong understanding of social media strategy, content planning, and platform management.
Ability to travel frequently to provinces and remote project locations.
Strong written and verbal communication skills in English, Dari, and Pashto preferred.
Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines

Submission Guideline
All interested and qualified candidates should fill out the application ( https://forms.gle/BVGTLBPzUJVTGaAA7 ) no later than May 31, 2026 .
Kindly rename your CV with your full name before submitting it.
Note:
Applicants who do not complete the online application form will not be considered.
Only short-listed candidates will be called for a written test and subsequent interview.
Tests and Interview will be conducted on a rolling basis.

Submission Email
https://forms.gle/BVGTLBPzUJVTGaAA7

expiring_today.title: Business Development Officer
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
هدف وظیفه:
هدف از این وظیفه، توسعه بازار، شناسایی و جذب فرصتهای جدید تجاری، مدیریت روابط با مشتریان و شرکا ، و
حمایت از رشد عواید شرکت در سطح ولایات میباشد. شخص منتخب مسئول توسعه شبکه مشتریان، ایجاد فرصتهای
همکاری، و تقویت جایگاه شرکت در بازار خواهد بود.

Duties and Responsibilities
وظایف و مسئولیتها :
کارمند توسعه تجارت (Business Development Officer) تحت رهنمود مدیر بخش توسعه تجارت فعالیت نموده ومسئولیتهای ذیل را بر عهده خواهد داشت:
توسعه بازار و جذب مشتریان (Business Acquisition):
شناسایی، تحلیل وجذب مشتریان جدید) MSP ها، تجار، شرکتها
ایجاد و توسعه فرصتهای تجاری در مناطق هدف.
معرفی خدمات و راهکارهای شرکت به مشتریان بالقوه .
پیگیری مستمر فرصتها تا مرحله نهایی (conversion).
مدیریت روابط با مشتریان و شرکا ) Client & Partner Management):
ایجاد وحفظ روابط مؤثر با مشتریان، شرکا و ذینفعان.
مدیریت جلسات حضوری و آنلاین جهت توسعه همکاریها .
پیگیری نیازمندیهای مشتریان و ارائه راه حل های مناسب.
تحلیل بازار و فرصتها (Market Analysis):
انجام تحقیقات بازار و تحلیل رقبا در بخش FinTech و خدمات مالی دیجیتال .
شناسایی فرصتهای جدید تجاری و پیشنهاد به مدیریت .
جمعآوری معلومات از بازار و ارائه گزارشهای تحلیلی .
هماهنگی داخلی و پشتیبانی فروش (Sales Coordination):
هماهنگی با تیمهای تخنیکی، عملیات، مالی و مارکیتینگ جهت پیشبرد فرصتها .
همکاری در تهیه پروپوزلها، پریزنتیشنها واسناد تجاری.
اطمینان از تطبیق درست خدمات برای مشتریان جدید .
بازاریابی و تقویت برند (Marketing & Visibility):
حمایت از فعالیتهای بازاریابی در سطح ولایات .
مشارکت در معرفی خدمات از طریق ایونتها، جلسات و بازدیدها .
جمعآوری بازخورد بازار برای بهبود خدمات .
گزارشدهی و مستندسازی (Reporting & Documentation):
ثبت و مدیریت معلومات مشتریان، فرصتها و فعالیتها .
ارائه گزارشهای منظم از فعالیتها.
مستندسازی جلسات، توافقات و پیشرفتها .
تحویلات (Deliverables):
دستیابی به اهداف تعیینشده در جذب مشتریان وتوسعه بازار.
ایجاد و مدیریت فعال فرصتهای تجاری.
ارائه گزارشهای منظم از فعالیتها، فرصتها و نتایج .
توسعه وحفظ روابط مؤثر با مشتریان و شرکا کلیدی.

Job Requirements
صلاحیتها و مهارتهای مورد نیاز
شایستگیهای عمومی :
توانایی توسعه بازار و ایجاد فرصتهای تجاری در محیطهای رقابتی .
مهارت قوی در برقراری ارتباط، مذاکره و مدیریت روابط با مشتریان و شرکا.
توانایی کار مستقل همراه با تمرکز بر اهداف و نتایج (target-driven).
انعطاف پذیری و توانایی انجام سفرهای کاری در ولایات .
تحصیلات و تجربه :
حداقل لیسانس در رشتههای اداره تجارت، مالی، اقتصاد، تکنالوژی معلوماتی یا رشتههای مرتبط .
حداقل ۵–۳ سال تجربه کاری در بخش توسعه تجارت، فروش، یا مارکیتینگ)ترجیحا در FinTech ، بانکداری یا
ICT .)
داشتن تجربه عملی در جذب مشتریان، مدیریت روابط، و دستیابی به اهداف فروش

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان علاقه مند میتوانند سیوی ) CV ( خود را با ذکر تجربه های کاری مرتبط به ایمیل آدرس زیر ارسال نمایند:
hr@naqdpay.af
برای اطلاعات بیشتر: 93728979709 +

expiring_today.title: IT & Western Union Assistant for Sar-e-Pol
expiring_today.description:
About Bank-e-Millie Afghan (BMA)
Bank-e-Millie Afghan (BMA) is the foremost first financial institution of Afghanistan established in 1933. Similarly, it was the first financial institution established in a public-private partnership set up with a 72% share held by the private sector. As the first bank in the country, BMA introduced formal banking services to the people and government of Afghanistan. Since then, the bank’s competitive strength and ongoing market leadership philosophy lays in its strong capital base and proven trustworthiness. In 1976, it was fully nationalized by the government of Afghanistan. Since its establishment, BMA has been a leading bank in providing modern and secure banking services. Securing depositors' funds is the top priority of the bank. At the same time, the bank is contributing considerably to the development of manufacturing, agriculture, services, and international trade in the country. BMA is operating based on strong corporate governance principles, financial risk management, and strict compliance to keep its credibility and trust. At present, BMA has 17 City Branches including the HQ and 4 Counters in Kabul, 22 Provincial Branches and 3 Counters accompanied by a broader outlook and prospect for growth and expansion in near future, and equity investments in the USA and England.

Job Description
The Branch IT + Western Union (WU) Assistant is responsible for providing technical support and assistance with IT systems in the branch, ensuring the efficient operation of banking technology. Additionally, this role encompasses managing Western Union transactions and services, providing exceptional customer service, and ensuring compliance with relevant policies and procedures.
Key Duties and Responsibilities:
IT Support
Technical Assistance
Provide day-to-day technical support for all banking software and hardware used within the branch.
Troubleshoot and resolve hardware and software issues, ensuring minimal disruption to branch operations.
Branch IT related Items Maintenance
Assist in the maintenance and updating of branch IT systems, including computers, networks, and hardware’s.
Ensure that all IT equipment is functioning properly and coordinate with external vendors for repairs as needed.
Provide services to branch all IT items at least twice in a month
User Training
Train branch staff on the use of banking software, equipment, and IT best practices to enhance their operational efficiency.
Develop user guides and training materials for specific IT processes as required.
Data Security
Assist in monitoring and implementing security measures to protect branch IT systems and customer data.
Ensure compliance with data protection policies and procedures.
Reporting
Maintain accurate records of service requests and IT incidents, providing reports to the Branch Manager and IT Department as needed.
WU (Western Union) Operations
Transaction Processing
Manage and process Western Union transactions including Send and receive, ensuring that all transactions comply with WU policy and procedure.
Assist customers with inquiries related to Western Union services, providing accurate information and resolving any issues that arise.
Customer Service
Provide exceptional customer service to clients utilizing Western Union services, ensuring a positive customer experience.
Compliance and Reconciliations
Process all WU transactions as per AML/CFT policy.
Conduct daily basis reconciliation during end of the day.
Prepare and submit reports related to Western Union activities to the Branch Manager.
Compliance
Adhere to all regulatory and compliance requirements related to customer service and banking operations.
Assist with CSO of the branch in daily branch activities.
Punctuality. (Follow official working time schedule properly).
Behave in a professional way with all the colleagues and customers of the branch.
Any other task assigned by Line Manager or will be assigned other duties and responsibilities as may be required to meet the goals and objectives of the bank.

Job Requirements
Education: Bachelor’s degree in BCS and master’s degree is preferred.
Experience: 3 years of experience and previous experience in IT support within a banking or financial services environment is a plus.
Skills and Competencies:
Strong technical skills with proficiency in computer systems, networking, and common software applications.
Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to troubleshoot technical issues effectively.
Good communication and interpersonal skills, with a strong focus on customer service.
Ability to work collaboratively within a team and manage multiple tasks effectively.
Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.
Fluency in Dari, Pashto, and English is required.

Submission Guideline
Qualified and interested applicants are encouraged to apply online through the BMA Job Portal at https://jobs.bma.com.af before the closing date.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

Submission Email
https://jobs.bma.com.af

expiring_today.title: IT Manager
expiring_today.description:
About HPL
Honest Public Ltd (HPL) is a group of companies, specializing in providing exceptional management services throughout Afghanistan. With over 1500+ staff throughout the country, we specialize in Supply, Logistics, Security, Customer Care, Consultancy, and Construction services.
At HPL, our top priority is delivering reliable and efficient services that meet the unique needs of our clients.
Our dedicated team of professionals works closely with clients to provide customized solutions that ensure maximum satisfaction.
We take pride in our ability to provide timely and dependable services to our clients, and we are committed to upholding the highest standards of quality and professionalism. Our services are designed to help businesses and organizations in Afghanistan operate effectively, safely, and efficiently.

Job Description
Running regular checks on network and data security
Identifying and acting on opportunities to improve and update software and systems
Developing and implementing IT policy and best practice guides for the organization
Designing training programs and workshops for staff
Conducting regular system audits
Running and sharing regular operation system reports with senior staff
Overseeing and determining timeframes for major IT projects including system updates, upgrades, migrations and outages
Managing and reporting on allocation of IT budget
Providing direction for IT team members
Identifying opportunities for team training and skills advancemen
Any other tasks assigned by supervisor.

Job Requirements
Education : Minimum Bachelor degree in Computer Science or Information Technology, higher will be an advantage
Experience : Minimum 7 year of relevant experience in Information Technology
Experience in project management will be considered as asset.
Excellent Technical knowledge of network and PC hardware
Excellent trouble shooting knowledge.
Extensive experience in reporting and knowledge of major donor rules
Languages: Proficiency in both national languages and Excellent communication skills in English is required.
Excellent Conflict Management and people management skills
The incumbent must be Punctual, reliable and have strong communication skill
Self-Motivated, Quick learner with a positive attitude

Submission Guideline
To apply for the position, please follow these steps:
Open the link: HPL JOB APPLICATION FORM
Important Notes:
Please ensure that your current address and the specific job location you are applying for are clearly included in both your CV and application form .
Applications missing this information will not be accepted .
Applications received after the closing date will not be considered.
Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.
If you encounter any issues during the application process, please contact us at 0202201261 or email hr@hpl.af. (Please note: This email is not for CV submissions.)
Please Note that:
HPL commits to a fair and transparent recruitment procedure.
HPL will conduct its recruitment based on need only.
Only the HR department will contact you during the recruitment process.
Only short-listed candidates whose application responds to the criteria will be contacted & local applicants from the same province are encouraged to apply and will be given priority.
HPL is not responsible for any job announcements made on other websites or social media platforms. Only information shared through official channels will be considered valid.
HPL does not charge any fees at any stage of the recruitment process. Applying for a vacancy is completely free of charge .

Submission Email
visit this website (jobs.hpl.af) or click the link above "HPL JOB APPLICATION FORM"

expiring_soon.title: Digital and Physical Security Trainer for AWN Staff Capacity Building
expiring_soon.description:
About AWN
Following the Fourth World Conference on Women in Beijing, China, where Afghan women representing various organizations and United Nations agencies participated, the idea of establishing a unified platform for cooperation and coordination among Afghan women emerged. Inspired by global women’s movements and the need for collective action, these participants formally established the Afghan Women’s Network (AWN) in 1995.
The Afghan Women’s Network (AWN) serves as a national platform that brings together women’s organizations and individual members to strengthen collaboration, promote shared learning, and support institutional development. It provides a structured space for organizations to enhance their capacities and contribute to community-based initiatives.
AWN maintains an active presence in multiple provinces, including Kabul, Herat, Balkh, Kandahar, Bamyan, Paktia, Nangarhar, Badakhshan, and Kunduz, while also engaging members across other regions of Afghanistan. As an umbrella network, AWN works in coordination with its members to implement initiatives focused on community well-being, access to services, and capacity strengthening. The network comprises over 5,000 individual members and more than 150 member organizations.
In response to increasing digital and physical security risks affecting staff, activists, women leaders, and organizations operating in Afghanistan, AWN seeks to engage a qualified Digital and Physical Security Trainer to conduct practical, participatory training sessions on digital and physical security for AWN staff.

Job Description
Purpose of the Assignment
The purpose of this assignment is to strengthen the knowledge, awareness, and practical skills of AWN staff in digital and physical security.
The trainer will conduct training sessions for AWN staff to improve their ability to:
Protect organizational and personal digital information
Identify and respond to cybersecurity threats
Apply safe online communication practices
Improve workplace and personal physical security awareness
Strengthen emergency preparedness and incident response
Follow organizational safety and security procedures
Ob jectives
The specific objectives of the assignment are:
Increase staff awareness of digital and physical security risks
Build practical skills for secure communication and data protection
Improve understanding of access control, emergency preparedness, and incident reporting
Strengthen staff capacity to prevent, identify, and respond to security incidents
Promote a culture of safety and security across the organization
Scope of Work
Training Preparation
Review project objectives and participant profiles
Understand security and digital cybersecurity risks in the Afghanistan context
Coordinate with AWN project team
Adapt training content to local realities
Ensure content is simple, practical, and participatory
Development of Training Materials
Training manual on Digital and Physical Security Awareness
Session plans
PowerPoint presentations
Case studies and real-life examples
Handouts and safety guidelines
Pre-test and post-test tools
Delivery of Training
Facilitate interactive training sessions
Use participatory methods (discussion, role play, group work)
Provide practical examples of digital and physical security risks
Ensure a safe and engaging learning environment
Explain digital and physical safety tools and practices clearly
Encourage participant questions and experience sharing
Reporting
Attendance sheet.
Training materials.
Pre-test and post-test results.
Participant feedback summary.
Final training report.
Deliverables
Inception plan and training schedule
Training agenda and methodology
Training materials and participant handouts
Pre- and post-training assessment tools
Conducted training sessions
Final training report including

Job Requirements
Education
Bachelor’s degree is required
Master’s degree is preferred in fields such as, Information Technology, Management, Security Management, or related fields
Experience
Minimum five (5) years of demonstrated training experience
Proven experience delivering professional trainings and developing training manuals
Experience facilitating adult learning methodologies
Experience working with NGOs, women leaders, and civil society organizations
Demonstrated knowledge of digital and physical security practices.
Required Skills
The trainer must demonstrate:
Strong facilitation and communication skills
Training design and presentation skills
Effective time management and problem-solving abilities
Strong report writing and documentation skills
Ability to deliver practical and participatory learning sessions
Good understanding of digital and physical security risks in Afghanistan

Submission Guidelines
Applications received after the closing date will not be considered. · Please mention position title on the subject of email · Applications meeting the above requirement will be entertained only. · Only the short listed candidates will be notified. Contact Information Interested candidates, who meet the above-mentioned requirements, should submit an up-to-date Resume/CV, with a Letter of Interest, via email to the following e-mail address: vacancies@awn-af.org - Late applications won’t be considered

expiring_soon.title: Digital Marketing & Graphic Designer
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
The Graphic Designer will work under the direction of the Department Head and will be responsible for the following:

Duties and Responsibilities
Leading the design process for visual communication, including web and mobile applications, digital marketing materials, and other graphic design projects.
Creating visually compelling designs that ensure seamless user experiences (UX) and engaging user interfaces (UI).
Developing wireframes, prototypes, and design specifications for digital and print-based projects.
Designing marketing materials such as social media creatives, banners, flyers, brochures, and promotional graphics.
Collaborating with cross-functional teams (marketing, product management, and developers) to ensure design solutions meet both user needs and business goals.
Ensuring brand consistency across all visuals and user interface elements across digital touchpoints and marketing materials.
Conducting user research and usability testing to improve design decisions and optimize user experiences.
Staying updated with industry trends related to UX/UI design best practices, emerging technologies, and graphic design tools.
Impact of Results
Strengthening PARSA Technologies’ digital presence through user-centric designs and high-quality graphic content.
Improving user satisfaction and engagement by providing intuitive, functional, and aesthetically pleasing digital experiences.
Contributing to the company's ongoing success by driving design innovation in digital products and visual communication.

Job Requirements
Requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering or Equivalent Subject
3+ years of experience in field operations, fintech, telecom
Strong communication and negotiation skills
Ability to work in field and travel frequently
Result-oriented with strong execution capability
Key Skills:
Advanced proficiency in design tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and other graphic design tools.
A strong understanding of UX/UI design principles, usability, accessibility best practices, and graphic design fundamentals.
Expertise in creating wireframes, prototypes, and detailed design documentation.
Strong creative skills in graphic design for various digital media, including marketing and promotional materials.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in cross-functional teams.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who meet the above requirements are invited to submit the following documents:
Updated CV
Cover Letter • Applications must be sent to: hr@naqdpay.af
Please clearly mention the Position Title and Vacancy Number (e.g., Digital Marketing & Graphic Designer – NP#0006) in the subject line of the email. Applications without a proper subject line may not be considered.
Application Deadline: two weeks after announcement
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further assessment.
The Company reserves the right to accept or reject any application without prior notice.
For any further information, you can contact +93728979703

expiring_soon.title: Full-Stack Software Developer
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
STATECORPS is looking for a skilled Full-Stack Developer to design, develop, and maintain scalable applications/software. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience with modern front-end frameworks, back-end technologies, APIs and system management.

Duties and Responsibilities
A Full-Stack Software Developer designs, builds, and maintains end-to-end web applications, ensuring performance, security, and scalability.
1. Front-End Development
Build responsive, accessible UIs using modern frameworks (React, Angular, Vue.js).
Translate wireframes into interactive user experiences.
Ensure cross-browser compatibility and performance optimization.
2. Back-End & API Development
Design and maintain RESTful and GraphQL APIs.
Implement server-side logic using frameworks (Laravel, Django, Express, Spring Boot).
Integrate third-party services and external APIs.
3. Database Management
Design and optimize relational and NoSQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB).
Ensure data integrity, indexing, and efficient querying.
Manage migrations, backups, and recovery processes.
4. Performance Optimization
Improve system performance via caching, load balancing, and efficient queries.
Optimize front-end assets and backend processes.
Implement scalable architectures and CDN usage.
5. Security Implementation
Apply authentication/authorization (OAuth, JWT, SSO).
Follow secure coding standards (OWASP practices).
Enforce encryption, validation, and regular security updates.
6. Testing & Quality Assurance
Develop unit, integration, and end-to-end tests.
Debug and resolve issues across environments.
Integrate automated testing into CI/CD pipelines.
7. DevOps & Deployment
Build CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins).
Use containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).
Deploy applications on cloud platforms and web servers.
8. Code Management & Documentation
Use Git with structured workflows for version control.
Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.
Maintain API and system documentation.
9. Monitoring & Maintenance
Monitor systems using tools like Prometheus or Grafana.
Handle production issues, updates, and system health checks.
Perform routine maintenance and optimizations.
10. Collaboration & Agile Practices
Work with cross-functional teams (design, QA, product, DevOps).
Translate business requirements into technical solutions.
Participate in Agile processes and mentor team members.
11. System Architecture
Design scalable and fault-tolerant systems.
Evaluate and select appropriate technologies.
Communicate architectural decisions and trade-offs.

Job Requirements
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field
Experience:
5–7 years of relevant experience.
Required Knowledge:
CMS Development: Ability to build and manage websites using platforms such as WordPress, Joomla, or similar systems.
Back-End & API Development: Knowledge of developing and documenting APIs using modern frameworks and tools (e.g., Laravel, Django, Express, Postman, Swagger).
Databases & Data Management: Understanding of relational and NoSQL databases, data storage, and retrieval.
Deployment & Infrastructure: Knowledge of containerization, orchestration, and deployment (Docker, Kubernetes).
Server Management: Understanding of configuring and maintaining web servers (Nginx, Apache, or equivalents).
Required Skills:
Core Web Technologies: Proficiency in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Front-End Frameworks: Experience with React, Angular, or Vue.js.
Back-End Development: Hands-on experience with at least one modern framework (Laravel, Django, Flask, Node.js/Express, or Spring Boot).
Databases: Practical experience with SQL and NoSQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis).
API Integration: Ability to design and consume RESTful or GraphQL APIs.
Version Control: Proficiency in Git and collaborative workflows.
CMS Platforms: Familiarity with WordPress, Joomla, or Drupal.
Web Security: Understanding of secure coding practices and common vulnerabilities.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified applicants are highly encouraged to apply by clicking on the “Apply” pop-up button displayed while viewing the job vacancy.
NOTE: Only short-listed candidates will be invited for written test/interview.

expiring_soon.title: IT Intern
expiring_soon.description:
About HPL
Honest Public Ltd (HPL) is a group of companies, specializing in providing exceptional management services throughout Afghanistan. With over 1500+ staff throughout the country, we specialize in Supply, Logistics, Security, Customer Care, Consultancy, and Construction services.
At HPL, our top priority is delivering reliable and efficient services that meet the unique needs of our clients.
Our dedicated team of professionals works closely with clients to provide customized solutions that ensure maximum satisfaction.
We take pride in our ability to provide timely and dependable services to our clients, and we are committed to upholding the highest standards of quality and professionalism. Our services are designed to help businesses and organizations in Afghanistan operate effectively, safely, and efficiently.

Job Description
Assist in the installation, configuration, and maintenance of hardware and software.
Provide first-level technical support to users (in-person, via email, or over the phone).
Help maintain inventory of IT assets (hardware and software).
Support troubleshooting of network, internet, and connectivity issues.
Assist with system upgrades, backups, and data recovery processes.
Monitor and report any unusual system activity or security threats.
Document technical procedures and create user guides as needed.
Perform any other tasks as assigned by the IT Department.

Job Requirements
Education: Bachelor's degree in in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field. ​
Experience: Minimum 1 year of relevant experience.
Languages: Proficiency in both national languages and in English language.
Knowledge of computer hardware, software, and networking.
Familiarity with Microsoft Windows, Office applications, and IT tools.
Good problem-solving skills and willingness to learn.
Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
Ability to work independently and within a team.

Submission Guideline
To apply for the position, please follow these steps:
Open the link: HPL JOB APPLICATION FORM
Important Notes:
Please ensure that your current address and the specific job location you are applying for are clearly included in both your CV and application form .
Applications missing this information will not be accepted .
Applications received after the closing date will not be considered.
Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.
If you encounter any issues during the application process, please contact us at (www.hpl.af/contacts)
Please Note that:
HPL commits to a fair and transparent recruitment procedure.
HPL will conduct its recruitment based on need only.
Only the HR department will contact you during the recruitment process.
Only short-listed candidates whose application responds to the criteria will be contacted & local applicants from the same province are encouraged to apply and will be given priority.
HPL is not responsible for any job announcements made on other websites or social media platforms. Only information shared through official channels will be considered valid.
HPL does not charge any fees at any stage of the recruitment process. Applying for a vacancy is completely free of charge.

Submission Email
visit this website (www.hpl.af/jobs) or click the link above "HPL JOB APPLICATION FORM"

details.Contract Duration: one Year (with possible extension based on performance)

Role Summary
The Market Development Officer will work under the direction of the Department Head and will be responsible for the following:

Duties and Responsibilities
Conduct field visits to identify and onboard new partners/agents
Support partner/agent activation and ensure operational readiness
Plan and execute campaigns to increase customer usage
Build and maintain relationships with partners/agents in assigned areas
Monitor performance and report on growth activities
Coordinate with internal teams (marketing, operations, compliance)

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or related field
3+ years of experience in field operations, fintech, telecom
Strong communication and negotiation skills
Ability to work in field and travel frequently
Result-oriented with strong execution capability
Key Skills:
Market development and field execution
Relationship management
Campaign execution
Problem-solving and adaptability

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who meet the above requirements are invited to submit the following documents:
Updated CV

expiring_soon.title: Network Specialist
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
A Network Specialist is responsible for designing, implementing, maintaining, and securing the organization’s network infrastructure. This role ensures high availability, optimal performance, and robust protection against evolving security threats.

Duties and Responsibilities
· Design, install, configure, and maintain network hardware (routers, switches, firewalls, servers).
· Monitor and optimize network performance; proactively troubleshoot to minimize downtime.
· Manage and support LAN, WAN, and FTTH network environments.
· Implement and enforce network security best practices and protection measures.
· Diagnose and resolve connectivity issues for end users.
· Perform system updates, backups, and preventive maintenance.
· Document network configurations, changes, and operational procedures.
· Collaborate with IT and cross-functional teams to enhance reliability and scalability.

Job Requirements
· Strong knowledge of networking protocols (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP).
· Hands-on experience with Huawei routers and FTTH network devices.
· Proficiency with switches, servers, and firewalls.
· Solid understanding of network security principles and practices.
· Advanced troubleshooting and problem-solving capabilities.
· Familiarity with Windows and Linux operating systems.
· Effective communication and teamwork skills
Qualifications:
· Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or related field.
· Industry-recognized certifications highly preferred:
· Cisco CCNA / CCNP
· CompTIA Network+
· CompTIA Security+
Note : candidates with knowledge of operating QuickBooks will be preferred.
Education:
· Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or related field.
Work Environment
· FTTH network operations and field deployments.
· Data center environments.
· Remote support and on-site technical assignments.

Submission Guidelines
AfghanPAY services company adapts quality circles of youngsters who have expertise & potential in the area of interest within the domain of business lines adapted by AfghanPAY. We require our potential candidates to submit their cover letter + CVs to hr@afghan-pay.com . Please write your vacancy number (AFP-TOPUP2026-007 & field of expertise) in the subject line of your E-mail. We are thinking about our nation’s future & fostering a culture of excellence & welcoming those who share our vision.
Please note: only short-listed candidates are contacted.

expiring_soon.description: About Baheer Group Baheer Group (BG) is a prominent manufacturer and provider of high-quality papers and paper products, offering premium solutions in Papers, Packaging, Printing, Mines & Energy, and supplying state-of-the-art Printing Machineries. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in our diversified portfolio, which caters to both domestic and international markets. Backed by an extensive Group of Companies, BG consistently surpasses industry standards, specializing in customized products tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients. Job Description We are seeking a skilled Graphic Designer with hands-on experience in printing press workflows and packaging design. The ideal candidate will create production-ready artwork for labels, cartons, corrugated boxes, flexible packaging, and promotional print materials. He will work closely with prepress technicians and production managers to ensure that design and color are accurate usage. · Work closely with customers to make changes in layout and design until a final product can be agreed upon. · Assist each individual program area with design of printing materials · Prioritize projects and deadlines, as needed, adhering to production schedule · Stay up to date on current design trends and technology · Any other duties assign by Graphic Design Manager Job Requirements at least 3 years' work experience in Printing Press & Packaging Offset print designing experience Experience with using Adobe Suite CC (Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign), Submission Guideline Baheer Group is an excellent place to grow your career. Don't hesitate to apply the vacant position. Please note only short-listed candidates will be contacted for an interview. Submission Email hr.pkg@baheer.af

expiring_soon.title: Motion Graphic Designer
expiring_soon.description:
About National Radio & Television of Afghanistan
The National Radio and Television of Afghanistan started broadcasting in voice form for the first time under the name of Kabul Radio in 1925 (1304 by the Afghan calendar), and then it continued under the name of National Radio of Afghanistan. On the 19 August in the year of 1978, it started broadcasting on television. The National Radio and Television of Afghanistan, since its establishment, has played a significant role in society by effectively fulfilling its national mission of informing the public about the country's national interests and promoting public awareness. With its widespread branches and broadcasts across the nation, it serves as the official state broadcasting organization.

Job Description
صلاحیت و مسئولیت های وظیفوی:
وظایف تخصصی:
ایدیت برنامه ها و گزارشات تصویری به وقت تعیین جهت نشر و پخش آن از طریق نشرات تلویزیون ملی؛
نظارت و حصول اطمینان از امور گرافیک نشراتی برنامه های مربوطه جهت نشر بهتر برنامه های تلویزیونی در مطابقت به اهداف عمومی ریاست عمومی رادیو؛
ارائه طرح ها و رای حل های مسلکی موثر جهت بهبود فعالیت های تولیدی و نشراتی بخش های مربوطه؛
استفاده و بکارگیری معیاری از ستدیو های SD و HD و رسیده گی به مشکلات تخنیکی بخش های مربوطه؛
حصول اطمینان و کارشناسی دقیق از تمامی فعالیت های مربوط به ستدیو های تلویزیون و رادیو (کامره ها، لایت ها، میکسر های ویدیو و آدیو ...) به منظور پیشبرد امور گرافیکی جهت تهیه برنامه های رادیویی و تلویزیونی
انکشاف طرح های Motion graphics بطور انفرادی و یا در مشوره با پرودیوسران مربوطه.
نظارت و کنترول از جریان ثبت و نشر برنامه های رادیو و تلویزیون به منظور حل مشکلات گرافیکی نشرات با کیفیت و معیاری.
سهم گیری فعال در روند ساخت storyboards مرتبط با Motion graphics.
طراح و دیزاین گرافیک های ثابت (پوستر، لوگو، برشور، اطلاعیه ها، تمبنیل ها و کاور فوتوها)
مراقبت از امور گرافیکی بخش های مربوطه به منظور جلوگیری از سکتگی در نشرات رادیو تلویزیون ملی؛
ساخت تمپلیت های کاری برای بهبود کار و اهداف متوقعه اداره
داشتن هماهنگی لازم با تیم فنی، رادیو تلویزیون ملی افغانستان بمنظور انسجام هر چه بهتر امور مربوطه.
تامین ارتباط و همآهنگی با سایر بخش های مرتبط جهت پیشبرد امور محوله؛
سهم گیری در پروسه نشرات برنامه های تلویزیونی در همکاری با بخش ارزیابی و نشر؛
تهيه گرافیک و پس زمينه های مختلف کمپيوتری مطابق خواست دايرکتران و پروديوسران برنامه و ايجاد هماهنگی با اعضای مسلکی بمنظور ثبت و تهيه برنامه های با کيفيت از نگاه تصوير و انيميشن.
تهیه زگنال ها و پروموشن های برنامه های تلویزیونی؛
ارائه طرح ها، متحرک سازی و ساخت پروژه های Motion graphics از آغاز الی اتمام؛
حفظ و نگهداری از وسایل و امکانات کاری مربوطه به منظور جلوگیری از استهلاک شدن قبل از وقت آن؛
بلدیت و توانایی در ساخت پروژه های مختلف از قبیل :
Channel Branding (brand identities, titles sequences)
Show packaging (Idents, openers, lower thirds, stings, transitions, promo)
Motion graphics for web, mobile and everyday broadcast projects
وظایف مدیریتی:
1. ترتیب پلان کاری ماهوار، ربعوار و سالانه در مطابقت با پلان عمومی، به منظور رسیدن به اهداف تعیین شده؛
2. ارائه گزارش ماهوار، ربعوار و سالانه از فعالیت های انجام شده به مسؤولین و مقامات مربوطه؛
3. اجرای سایر وظایف که از طرف مقامات مطابق پالیسی نظام، قوانین، مقررات و اهداف اداره مربوطه سپرده می شود؛
وظایف هماهنگی:
1. هماهنگی با همکاران و مسؤولین اداره مربوطه جهت انسجام و پیشبرد امور محوله.

Job Requirements
تحصیلات، تجارب و مهارت های لازم:
تحصیلات
داشتن سند تحصیلی حد اقل لیسانس از رشته های گرافیک دیزاین ، هنر های زیبا ، طراحی دیجیتال ، انیمیشن ، مولتی میدیا ، سینما و تلویزیون ، ژورنالیزم و رسانه های دیجیتال ، مرتبط به بست، و به دارندگان مدارک بالاتر از آن ترجیح داده میشود.
تجارب
داشتن حداقل 3 سال برای دوکتورا ، پنج سال برای ماستر و 10 سال برای دارنده مدرک لیسانس تجربه کاری مرتبط به وظیفه و یا مشابه به آن لازم و ضروریست.
مهارت ها
Adobe after Effects
Premiere Pro
Photoshop
Illustrator
Cinema 4D, Blender در صورت نیاز به سه ‌بعدی
داشتن مهارت در استفاده های کمپیوتر و سائر برنامه های مورد نیاز وظیفه مربوطه؛

Submission Guideline
لطف نموده سی وی، تذکره، اسناد تحصیلی و اسناد تجربه کاری خویش را در یک فایل پی دی اف در لینک فوق آپلود نمائید.
مهربانی وکړی خپل اسناد لکه سی وی، تحصیلی سند، کاری سوابق او تذکره په یو پی دی اف فایل کی پورته لینک کی آپلود کری.
لینک ثبت نام:
https://forms.gle/zBd35FZG27qoPqQ19

Submission Email
https://forms.gle/zBd35FZG27qoPqQ19

expiring_soon.title: Senior PHP / Laravel Developer (High-Level – Product & System Builder)
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
Role Overview
We are looking for a highly experienced Senior PHP/Laravel Developer who has built complete real-world systems, not just features. You will work on complex business applications and improve architecture, performance, and scalability.
What We Expect
Experience building complete applications end-to-end
Work on production systems with real users
Strong understanding of business logic and API integrations
Ability to analyze, refactor, and optimize existing systems

Duties and Responsibilities
Core Responsibilities
Take ownership of backend development using Laravel
Clean and refactor existing codebase
Design and build REST APIs
Implement complex workflows (CRM, invoicing, etc.)
Database design, normalization and development
Optimize database queries and performance
Integrate third-party APIs and services
Write production-grade, maintainable code
Some other tasks will be assigned by supervisor.
Application layers knowledge and design application with representation, logic and API independently

Job Requirements
Required Experience
6–10+ years PHP development experience
Expert in Laravel
Experience building CRM / ERP / SaaS systems
Strong MySQL and API architecture knowledge
Strong system design and backend structuring skills
Required Tools & Practices.
GitHub
DevOps
Agile methodology
Must-Have Skills
Ability to design systems, not just code features
Microservice application development.
Strong debugging and problem-solving skills
Experience with large codebases
Clean code practices (SOLID, modular architecture)
Preferred
Payment integrations (Stripe, PayPal)
AI or automation experience
SaaS or multi-tenant systems
Experience as lead developer or architect

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates should submit their CV/Resume to: careers@afgtech.com
The email subject line must be: Senior PHP / Laravel Developer
Please ensure your application clearly highlights your relevant experience and qualifications.
⚠️ Note: This position requires the qualifications listed above. If you do not meet the essential requirements, we kindly ask that you do not apply .

tech_banking_jobs.title: IT & Western Union Assistant for Sar-e-Pol
tech_banking_jobs.description:
About Bank-e-Millie Afghan (BMA)
Bank-e-Millie Afghan (BMA) is the foremost first financial institution of Afghanistan established in 1933. Similarly, it was the first financial institution established in a public-private partnership set up with a 72% share held by the private sector. As the first bank in the country, BMA introduced formal banking services to the people and government of Afghanistan. Since then, the bank’s competitive strength and ongoing market leadership philosophy lays in its strong capital base and proven trustworthiness. In 1976, it was fully nationalized by the government of Afghanistan. Since its establishment, BMA has been a leading bank in providing modern and secure banking services. Securing depositors' funds is the top priority of the bank. At the same time, the bank is contributing considerably to the development of manufacturing, agriculture, services, and international trade in the country. BMA is operating based on strong corporate governance principles, financial risk management, and strict compliance to keep its credibility and trust. At present, BMA has 17 City Branches including the HQ and 4 Counters in Kabul, 22 Provincial Branches and 3 Counters accompanied by a broader outlook and prospect for growth and expansion in near future, and equity investments in the USA and England.

Job Description
The Branch IT + Western Union (WU) Assistant is responsible for providing technical support and assistance with IT systems in the branch, ensuring the efficient operation of banking technology. Additionally, this role encompasses managing Western Union transactions and services, providing exceptional customer service, and ensuring compliance with relevant policies and procedures.
Key Duties and Responsibilities:
IT Support
Technical Assistance
Provide day-to-day technical support for all banking software and hardware used within the branch.
Troubleshoot and resolve hardware and software issues, ensuring minimal disruption to branch operations.
Branch IT related Items Maintenance
Assist in the maintenance and updating of branch IT systems, including computers, networks, and hardware’s.
Ensure that all IT equipment is functioning properly and coordinate with external vendors for repairs as needed.
Provide services to branch all IT items at least twice in a month
User Training
Train branch staff on the use of banking software, equipment, and IT best practices to enhance their operational efficiency.
Develop user guides and training materials for specific IT processes as required.
Data Security
Assist in monitoring and implementing security measures to protect branch IT systems and customer data.
Ensure compliance with data protection policies and procedures.
Reporting
Maintain accurate records of service requests and IT incidents, providing reports to the Branch Manager and IT Department as needed.
WU (Western Union) Operations
Transaction Processing
Manage and process Western Union transactions including Send and receive, ensuring that all transactions comply with WU policy and procedure.
Assist customers with inquiries related to Western Union services, providing accurate information and resolving any issues that arise.
Customer Service
Provide exceptional customer service to clients utilizing Western Union services, ensuring a positive customer experience.
Compliance and Reconciliations
Process all WU transactions as per AML/CFT policy.
Conduct daily basis reconciliation during end of the day.
Prepare and submit reports related to Western Union activities to the Branch Manager.
Compliance
Adhere to all regulatory and compliance requirements related to customer service and banking operations.
Assist with CSO of the branch in daily branch activities.
Punctuality. (Follow official working time schedule properly).
Behave in a professional way with all the colleagues and customers of the branch.
Any other task assigned by Line Manager or will be assigned other duties and responsibilities as may be required to meet the goals and objectives of the bank.

Job Requirements
Education: Bachelor’s degree in BCS and master’s degree is preferred.
Experience: 3 years of experience and previous experience in IT support within a banking or financial services environment is a plus.
Skills and Competencies:
Strong technical skills with proficiency in computer systems, networking, and common software applications.
Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to troubleshoot technical issues effectively.
Good communication and interpersonal skills, with a strong focus on customer service.
Ability to work collaboratively within a team and manage multiple tasks effectively.
Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.
Fluency in Dari, Pashto, and English is required.

Submission Guideline
Qualified and interested applicants are encouraged to apply online through the BMA Job Portal at https://jobs.bma.com.af before the closing date.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

Submission Email
https://jobs.bma.com.af

details.Years of Experience: 3 years of experience and previous experience in IT support within a banking or financial services environment is a plus.

tech_banking_jobs.title: مدیر مالی و اداری و جلب و جذب اعضاء اتاق تجارت و سرمایه گذاری ولایت لغمان
tech_banking_jobs.company: Afghanistan Chamber of Commerce and Investment - ACCI
tech_banking_jobs.category: Accounting/Finance, Business Administration, Data Entry, Management, Accounting
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
مدیریت مالی و اداری و جلب و جذب اعضاء اتاق تجارت و سرمایه گذاری ولایت لغمان در چوکات مدیریت عامل اتاق لغمان فعالیت می نماید،مدیریت وکنترول امور حمایوی و پالیسی های،مصارفات، عواید و جلب و جذب اغضاء جدید و تمدید عضویت آن اتاق را برعهده دارد و همچنان وپلانگذاری مالی کوتا،میانه و طویل المدت جهت تامین مدیریت موثر مالی و جلب جذب اعضاء اتاق نیز ازجمله وظایف عمده آن می باشد.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. تهيه و ترتیب گزارشات مالي و ارائه آن به مدیریت اجرایئه عامل عندالضرورت به مسولین دفتر مرکزی
2. تهیه و ترتیب راپور های عواید، مصرف، راپور حاضری کارکنان اتاق مربوطه و ارائیه آن به شعبات مربوطه دفتر دفتر مرکزی ؛
3. ترتیب و تنظیم دیتابس برای کارکنان اتاق مربوط .
4. تشخیص و دریافت چالش ها و طرح پیشنهادات جهت اجرای مؤثر و مفید خدمات مالی، حسابی در هماهنگی با مدیر عامل اتاق لغمان؛
5. پيگيري تمديد قراردادها با نهاد های مختلف .
6. تمدید عضویت های اتاق مربوطه
7. ایجاد دیتابس برای اعضاء
8. بازار یابی بمنظور افزاش اعضاء
9. کنترول و نظارت از اکمال اجناس و قرطاسیه باب ضرورت شعبات اتاق ولایتی؛
10. استفاده از نورم ها وستندردهای حسابی پیشرفته ومدرن درامورات مالی یومیه
11. نظارت و کنترول از تطبیق تشکیل و بودجه اتاق مربوطه
12. انجام وتطبیق و بازرسی‌ها تمام معاملات مالی وحسابی
13. کنترول و بررسي يوميه از تماماً اسناد مدیریت مالي و حسابي اتاق لغمان
14. ترتیب و تنظیم نمودن ژورنال هاي حسابي ماهوا، ربعوار و سالانه به وقت و زمان آن به آمریت مالی دفتر مرکزی .
15. جمع آوری ارقام عواید گذارش دهی آن به دفتر مرکزی
16. حفظ و مراقبت از ساختمان ها، دارای ها و سیستم های موجوده
17. حصول اطمینان از جمع آوری عواید تمامی منابع عایداتی اتاق لغمان و تادیات آن به حساب عواید اتاق، به منظور بلند بردن سطح عواید اتاق .
18. مدیریت کنترول از تادیات بودجه های خارجی و کمک های بلا عوض، جهت استفاده درست و موثر آن .
19. . حصول اطمینان از مدیریت وکنترول از ثبت و راجستر املاک، اجناس و لوازم اتاق جهت استفاده مؤثر آن ها .
20. بررسی و اداره امور اداری و تجهیزان مرکز و رفع نیازمندی‌های کارمندان از قبیل، تجهیزات و ترمیم وسایل .
21. شرکت در مجالس و شوراهای اقتصادی ، تجارتی و مسایل مرتبط اداری، در هم آهنگی با مدیر عامل اتاق مربوط
22. دریافت گزارش های مالی از واحدها، پروژه ها و سایر نهاد های ارتباطی با اتاق و بررسی آنها درهماهنگی بخش های مربوطه
23. تهیه و ترتیب پلان کاری ماهوار، ربعوار و سالانه در مطابقت به پلان و اهداف تعیین شده اداره .
24. اجرای سایر وظایف مرتبط به وظیفه که از طرف آمر مربوط بر وی سپرده می‌شود .

Job Requirements
تحصیلات و تجارب :
1. حد اقل لسانس به اقتصاد و تجارت ، اداره و عامه ، تجارت بین الملل، مدیریت بازار یابی، مدیریت عرضه خدمات، بیزنس منجمنت (BA) و ماستری ارجحیت داده میشود .
2. حد اقل3 سال تجربه .
تخصص و مهارت ها
1. تسلط كامل به دانش و اطلاعات تخصصي مالي
2. آشنائی با نرم افزار و سافت ویر های مروج مالی و حسابداری .
3. مهارت در مدیریت و رهبری امور فعالیت های کاری اتاق .
4. توانایی جلب و جذب پروژه ها و کمک های بین المللی .
5. مهارت در تأمین روابط کاری با دونر ها و سازمان های بین الملل
6. تسلط به زبان های ملی (دری یا پشتو)
7. آشنایی به زبان انگلیسی .
8. مهارت لازم در کمپیوتر (بخصوص پروگرام های آفیس و ایکسیل)
9. مهارت لازم در برقراری روابط نیک بین کارکنان اتاق ولایتی

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان گرامی،در خواست نامه ها خویش را در بست متذکره ارسال می نماید، لطف نموده نام بست را در بخش موضوع ایمیل واضع سازید واسناد تحصیلی همرا با سی وی تان قبل از تاریخ 2026/05/22 به ایمیل‌آدرس های ذیل ارسال نماید:
laghman@acci.org.af
hr.manager@acci.org.af

details.Functional Area: Accounting/Finance, Business Administration, Data Entry, Management, Accounting

tech_banking_jobs.title: Sharia Audit Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Sharia Audit Officer is responsible for conducting periodic Sharia audits across the bank to ensure all products, services, contracts, transactions, and operational processes fully comply with Islamic Sharia principles and the rulings of the Sharia Supervisory Board. The role helps preserve the bank’s Islamic integrity and strengthens governance.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Sharia Audit Planning & Execution
Participate in preparing the annual Sharia Audit Plan based on risk assessment.
Conduct field audits in branches and departments to verify adherence to Sharia guidelines.
Examine financing files, contracts, documentation, and transaction flows for Sharia compliance.
Test samples of Murabaha, Ijara, Musharaka, Mudaraba, and deposit transactions against Sharia standards.
2. Review of Contracts, Policies & Procedures
Audit the implementation of Sharia-approved product structures and documentation.
Ensure operational procedures match the product manuals approved by the Sharia Supervisory Board (SSB).
Check whether staff are following required Sharia workflows (e.g., asset ownership, agency structures, disclosures, penalties handling).
3. Identification of Sharia Non-Compliance
Identify Sharia violations, deviations, or gaps during audits.
Discuss findings with relevant departments and agree on corrective actions.
Ensure non-compliance events are recorded, reported, and resolved within the required timeframe.
4. Reporting & Documentation
Prepare clear Sharia audit reports with observations, recommendations, and compliance ratings.
Submit audit results to the Head of Sharia Audit and contribute to reports for the Sharia Supervisory Board.
Maintain proper documentation of all audit working papers and evidence.
5. Follow-Up & Corrective Actions
Follow up on previously reported Sharia findings to verify whether corrective actions were implemented.
Work with business units, risk management, operations, and compliance teams to close audit issues.
6. Coordination & Support
Coordinate with Internal Audit and Compliance Department for combined risk reviews.
Provide Sharia guidance to departments during audits to improve their understanding and performance.
7. Capacity Building & Awareness
Support the development of Sharia audit tools, checklists, and audit methodologies.
Assist in internal awareness sessions on Sharia compliance requirements for staff.
8. Continuous Improvement
Stay updated on AAOIFI Sharia standards, new fatwas, and industry best practices.
. Recommend improvements to Sharia audit processes and internal controls

Job Requirements
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor’s degree in Islamic Studies, Sharia, Islamic Finance, Accounting, or Business Administration.
Professional certification in Islamic finance or Sharia audit (preferred).
1–3 years of experience in Islamic banking, Sharia audit, internal audit, or compliance roles.
Familiarity with AAOIFI standards and Islamic banking products.
Skills & Competencies
Strong understanding of Islamic banking and Sharia principles.
Ability to analyze financial transactions and documentation.
Good report writing skills with clarity and accuracy.
Strong attention to detail and analytical mindset.
Excellent communication and coordination abilities.
High integrity, objectivity, and professionalism.

Submission Guidelines
Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV)/Resume to (sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com)
Please Mention specific Job Title in subject of your E-mail otherwise your Email will not be considered.
Note: only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further recruitment process.
